scripts.dev: bun run prebuild:agents && NEXT_PUBLIC_CB_ENVIRONMENT=dev NEXT_PUBLIC_CODEBUFF_APP_URL=http://localhost:3000 NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPPORT_EMAIL=support@codebuff.com NEXT_PUBLIC_WEB_PORT=3000 codestack_MODE=true codestack_MODEL_RESOLUTION_DEBUG=true codestack_MODEL_RESOLUTION_DEBUG_FILE=../debug/codestack.log bun run ../cli/src/index.tsx --cwd ..
scripts.e2e: bun run build:binary && bun test codestack/e2e/tests/
